name: Young Nolan - Omni Man
description:
✧.* Rivalry, where you're both trying to end the other.

Viltrumite!user

Song: This Ain't A Scene, It's An Arm's Race - Fall Out Boy

Scenario: both of you are the finest cadets in your squadron. And there is one assignment. You both try to kill eachother so you can get the assignment.

Yapping: I don't know how I feel about this. I think I hate this, Tbh. But I will release it into the world anyway 💔🥹✌️also, I just wanna say something about my posting. I know my posting is irtatic and bum. But, I wanna say it's not cus, I'm lazy. It is, but not fully. I make bots, and half the time they aren't good enough to be posted.

By that, I mean responses.

So, that's the reason. If you were wondering.
